recent: Carousels drive the highest saves and re-serve reach right now. This one hands over the full text-back script instead of teasing it, which is what turns saves into DMs.
A 1-second hook and short punchy beats drive retention on reels, and this one hands the owner a self-audit they can run in the next five minutes instead of just a stat to scroll past.

Carousels are pulling the strongest saves and shares right now, especially numbered step-by-step formats; this one delivers a full no-cost retention tactic (dormant customer reactivation) that hasn't been covered in past posts.
